title: Dirty Dozen
subtitle: 12 questions on three traits: Machiavellianism, psychopathy, and narcissism. Answer for how you usually are.

items.text: I tend to manipulate others to get my way.
I have used deceit or lied to get my way.
I have used flattery to get my way.
I tend to exploit others toward my own ends.
I tend to be unconcerned with the morality of my actions.
I tend to be callous or insensitive.
I tend to want others to admire me.
I tend to want others to pay attention to me.
I tend to seek prestige or status.
I tend to expect special favors from others.
